script:
set +e
echo '=== before: /home/azureuser/.claude ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude 2>&1
ls -la /home/azureuser/.claude | head -30
echo '=== restore: chown azureuser /home/azureuser/.claude (non-recursive first) ==='
chown azureuser:azureuser /home/azureuser/.claude 2>&1
chmod 0750 /home/azureuser/.claude 2>&1
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude 2>&1
echo '=== check what other dirs in /home/azureuser/.claude got mis-chowned ==='
find /home/azureuser/.claude -maxdepth 1 -not -user azureuser 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '=== check the gabriel symlink theory ==='
file /home/gabriel/.claude 2>&1
ls -la /home/gabriel/ | grep -E '^l.*claude' 2>&1
echo '=== test mskai (azureuser) claude call works again ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 25 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -8
echo '===END==='
